items.title_zh: 23天靠AI短片赚100万！非科班出身逆袭影视区，郭帆导演拍手叫好
items.summary_zh: 量子位：B站首届AI创作大赛一等奖得主DiDi_OK凭借AI生成短片《牌子》23天创作完成，上线一周获超1000万次播放、80万点赞，斩获100万元大奖。本次大赛共8300余份参赛作品，总奖金超300万元，获奖作品均以真实表达和极简形式取胜，而非依赖复杂的AI工具或万能提示词。
量子位：Ilya Sutskever通过70页机密备忘录及200余页私人笔记，披露OpenAI内部权力博弈细节。文件显示OpenAI从创立起就被设计为极度注重安全的非营利结构，董事会对人类负责可牺牲公司本身。Ilya对CEO Sam Altman的信任危机逐步加深，最终导致2023年董事会罢免事件。文件通过Slack记录与内部邮件系统整理而成。

items.title_en: The Back Story Behind the First '$1.8B' AI Company
items.title_zh: 首家"18亿美元"AI公司背后的真实故事
items.summary_en: Hacker News: AI critic Gary Marcus investigates the origins behind what was marketed as the first $1.8 billion AI company. The piece examines AI hype cycles, valuation inflation, and the gap between marketing narratives and technological reality in the AI industry.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：AI批评家加里·马库斯深挖首家自称估值18亿美元的AI公司背后的故事，回顾AI炒作周期历史，探讨估值泡沫以及AI行业营销叙事与技术现实之间的落差。

items.title_en: Bernie Sanders: AI Is a Threat to Everything the American People Hold Dear
items.title_zh: 伯尼·桑德斯：AI威胁到美国人民珍视的一切
items.summary_en: Hacker News: Senator Bernie Sanders published a Wall Street Journal op-ed arguing that unchecked AI poses an existential threat to jobs, democracy, and social welfare. Sanders calls for aggressive AI regulation including worker protections, democratic oversight of AI deployment, and redistribution of AI-generated wealth.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：参议员伯尼·桑德斯在《华尔街日报》发表社论，警告不受约束的AI对就业、民主和社会福利构成根本性威胁，呼吁推行强力AI监管，包括工人保护、民主化AI部署监督及AI收益再分配。

items.title_en: Anthropic Expands Partnership with Google and Broadcom for Multi-Gigawatt Compute
items.title_zh: Anthropic与谷歌、博通扩大合作，建设多吉瓦算力基础设施
items.summary_en: Anthropic: Anthropic announced an expanded partnership with Google and Broadcom to develop multiple gigawatts of AI compute infrastructure. The deal aims to significantly scale the compute capacity available for training and deploying frontier AI models, reinforcing Anthropic's long-term investment in advanced AI research and product development.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic：Anthropic宣布与谷歌和博通扩大合作，共同建设多吉瓦级AI算力基础设施。此次合作旨在大幅扩展用于训练和部署前沿AI模型的算力规模，进一步巩固Anthropic在尖端AI研究和产品开发方面的长期投入。

items.title_en: Show HN: Hippo – Biologically Inspired Memory for AI Agents
items.title_zh: Hippo：仿生物海马体记忆架构的AI智能体记忆系统
items.summary_en: Hacker News: An open-source project introducing Hippo, a biologically inspired memory system for AI agents. Drawing on hippocampal memory models from neuroscience, the library provides agents with structured short-term and long-term memory, improving recall and contextual reasoning in extended interactions.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：开源项目Hippo推出面向AI智能体的仿生记忆系统，借鉴神经科学海马体模型，为智能体提供结构化短期与长期记忆能力，提升长对话中的回忆准确性和上下文推理效果。

items.title_en: Show HN: Meta-agent – Self-Improving Agent Harnesses from Live Traces
items.title_zh: Meta-agent：从实时轨迹中自我进化的智能体框架
items.summary_en: Hacker News: An open-source meta-agent framework that automatically improves agent behaviors by learning from live execution traces. The system analyzes real interaction logs to refine agent decision-making, offering a practical approach to continuous improvement without manual prompt engineering.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：一个开源元智能体框架，通过分析实时执行轨迹自动改善智能体行为，系统从真实交互日志学习以持续优化决策流程，无需手动提示工程即可实现自我进化。

items.title_en: Agent Reading Test: A Benchmark for AI Coding Agent Web Content Parsing
items.title_zh: Agent Reading Test：AI编程智能体网页读取能力基准
items.summary_en: Hacker News: The Agent Reading Test is a new benchmark evaluating how well AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, and others) read and parse web content. The test consists of 10 tests worth 20 points, surfacing silent failure modes where content gets truncated or CSS buries key information. Each test page is designed around a specific documented problem, embedding canary tokens to detect whether agents successfully parsed the content.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：Agent Reading Test是一个新基准，用于评估AI编程智能体（Claude Code、Cursor、GitHub Copilot等）读取和解析网页内容的能力。基准包含10个测试共20分，揭示内容截断、CSS遮蔽等静默失败模式。每个测试页面针对特定已记录问题设计，通过嵌入Canary Token检测智能体是否成功解析内容。

items.title_en: The Cult of Vibe Coding Is Dogfooding Run Amok
items.title_zh: "氛围编程"崇拜：失控的自我验证循环
items.summary_en: Hacker News: A critical essay arguing that 'vibe coding' — AI-assisted coding driven by feel rather than engineering discipline — has become a cult-like movement. Over-reliance on LLMs for coding encourages sloppy practices and creates technical debt, especially when the tools themselves are built this way.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：一篇批评性文章指出"氛围编程"（以感觉驱动的AI辅助编程）已演变为狂热运动，过度依赖LLM编程会催生随意开发习惯并积累技术债，尤其当开发工具本身也用此方式构建时问题更甚。

items.title_en: Launch HN: Freestyle – Sandboxes for Coding Agents
items.title_zh: Freestyle：为AI编程智能体提供沙箱基础设施
items.summary_en: Hacker News: Freestyle is a new platform providing unified infrastructure for AI-generated code, including Git, VMs, deployments, and execution environments. Designed for AI app builders and workflow engines, it offers sandboxed environments for coding agents to run safely. The launch targets the growing ecosystem of agentic coding workflows where AI-generated code needs isolated execution environments.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：Freestyle是面向AI生成代码的统一基础设施平台，提供Git、虚拟机、部署和执行环境管理。专为AI应用构建者和工作流引擎设计，为编程智能体提供沙箱运行环境，支持AI自动编写的代码在安全隔离环境中执行。

items.title_en: Iran Threatens OpenAI's Stargate Data Center in Abu Dhabi
items.title_zh: 伊朗威胁OpenAI在阿布扎比的Stargate数据中心
items.summary_en: The Verge: Iran has issued threats targeting OpenAI's Stargate data center under construction in Abu Dhabi, UAE. The threats highlight geopolitical risks surrounding major AI infrastructure investments in the Middle East, raising security concerns for OpenAI's ambitious billion-dollar compute expansion.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：伊朗对OpenAI在阿联酋阿布扎比在建的Stargate数据中心发出威胁，凸显中东地区大型AI基础设施投资面临的地缘政治风险，引发外界对OpenAI数十亿美元算力扩张计划的安全担忧。

items.title_en: Cisco CEO Chuck Robbins Wants Data Centers in Space
items.title_zh: 思科CEO罗宾斯：未来数据中心将建在太空
items.summary_en: The Verge: Cisco CEO Chuck Robbins shared his vision for placing data centers in space to meet the exploding power demands of AI. Robbins discussed energy challenges facing AI infrastructure and Cisco's positioning in the evolving AI networking landscape.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：思科CEO查克·罗宾斯在采访中提出将数据中心建设在太空的构想，以应对AI爆炸式增长带来的能源需求挑战，并探讨思科在AI网络领域的战略布局。

items.title_en: Better MoE Model Inference with Warp Decode
items.title_zh: Warp Decode：提升MoE模型推理速度1.8倍
items.summary_en: Cursor: Cursor's research team introduces warp decode, a new inference technique for MoE models on Blackwell GPUs that achieves 1.84x throughput improvement while also improving accuracy. By flipping the parallelism axis from expert-centric to warp-centric, the method delivers outputs 1.4x closer to the target distribution. The technique is designed for small-batch decode scenarios where standard expert-parallel approaches underperform.
items.summary_zh: Cursor：Cursor研究团队发布warp decode，一种面向Blackwell GPU上MoE模型的推理新技术。通过将并行轴从以专家为中心翻转为以warp为中心，在小批量解码场景下实现1.84倍吞吐量提升，同时输出准确性提高1.4倍，更接近目标分布。该方法同时改善了性能和精度。

items.title_zh: OpenAI推出安全研究奖学金计划
items.summary_en: OpenAI: OpenAI announced the Safety Fellowship, a new program for external researchers, engineers, and practitioners to pursue safety and alignment research on advanced AI systems. The fellowship runs from September 14, 2026 through February 5, 2027. Priority areas include safety evaluation, ethics, robustness, scalable mitigations, privacy-preserving safety methods, and agentic oversight. Fellows receive monthly stipend, compute support, and mentorship. Applications are open until May 3.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI：OpenAI宣布设立Safety Fellowship，面向外部研究人员、工程师和从业者，支持其开展前沿AI系统安全与对齐研究。项目时间为2026年9月14日至2027年2月5日，重点方向包括安全评估、伦理、鲁棒性、可扩展缓解措施、保护隐私的安全方法及智能体监督。申请截止日期为5月3日，可远程或在伯克利参与。
